[Sistem: Berikut ringkasan percakapan sebelumnya]
[RINGKASAN PERCAKAPAN SEBELUMNYA]
Percakapan membahas keterbatasan API Groq free tier (100K tokens per day) yang tidak cukup untuk menjalankan agen AI dengan banyak tools. Ditemukan bahwa Gemini free tier menawarkan batas lebih tinggi (hingga 1 juta token per hari) tanpa perlu kartu kredit. Saat mencoba menggunakan API key Gemini yang sudah ada, muncul error **401 (Unauthorized)** — menunjukkan API key tidak valid atau sudah expired. Belum ada solusi yang berhasil diterapkan; percakapan berhenti di tahap identifikasi masalah autentikasi.
Oke, gue udah tangkap konteksnya. Lanjut!

**Key lo invalid.** Format `AQ.Ab8...` itu **OAuth token**, bukan API key Gemini.

Gemini API key harus format: `AIzaSy...` (39 karakter, mulai `AIza`)

**Cara dapat yang bener:**
1. Buka [aistudio.google.com/apikey](https://aistudio.google.com/apikey)
2. Klik **"Create API Key"**
3. Copy key yang mulai `AIza...`
4. Update di `.env`:
```bash
GEMINI_API_KEY=AIzaSy...
```

Lo paste key baru, gue update + test langsung.

**Kiyotaka.ai** — Trading charting platform. Ini yang lo pake buat trading?

Kiyotaka - Advanced Trading Platform | Kiyotaka Trade the future, today Why choose when you can have everything? Get Started Our Ecosystem The Next Evolution A complete reimagination of how traders interact with markets. Powered by our proprietary high-performance charting engine, capable of rendering millions of data points with zero lag — bringing together order flow, order-book heatmaps, and every layer of aggregated market data in one unified view. The Hubs turn Kiyotaka into a shared workspace for discovery. A place where traders build together — sharing strategies, refining logic, and uncovering what works through transparent performance and community trust. kScript is a next-generation scripting language built for traders — familiar yet exponentially more powerful. It gives you direct access to raw order-book arrays, multi-symbol data, and live computations across thousands of assets. Code, test, and deploy custom logic in real time. Trending News Loading narratives... Stories Traders tell their best stories with Kiyotaka CryptoCondom @crypto_condom I dont know the team and ive never been paid to post....but can honestly say I use @kiyotaka_ai regularly if im interested order flow. Its free and slick. Genuinely good product and worth checking out. Loading... Willy Woo @woonomic Trading BTC on Binance reminds my of my childhood playing Pong, except they use paddles made of magic tokens worth $100M. Loading... Skew Δ @52kskew $BTC and there's your short covering flow. Strong positive delta & bid flows leading price here aggressive longs opening as well, probably to balance out deltas especially of the net short positioning from yesterday Price action tends to be pretty erratic during these flows, just fyi Loading... Ted @TedPillows Too much selling at this point. Retail, whales, and institutions are all selling Bitcoin. Loading... s @skepticalxbt can see sellers exhausting with each leg down, z score oi being within the lows and people carelessly opening shorts i think the unwind will be a bit bigger, so a reentry is still on the cards but somewhat lower :) (if you want the @kiyotaka_ai template, run this post up) Loading... Back @BackQuant Update on some free tools I published on @kiyotaka_ai recently, all open-source. Here's a breakdown of what they are: 1. Open Levels: Plots daily, weekly, monthly, and yearly open levels, allowing you to track key price levels and observe how the price reacts around them. 2. Bid-Ask Depth Imbalance: Shows order flow imbalance at different depth levels of the order book. Understand market sentiment and where the pressure is coming from. 3. Put to Call Ratio: Measures the balance between call and put volume. A higher ratio indicates more puts, while a lower ratio indicates more calls. Helps gauge market sentiment and risk appetite. They also recently introduced aggregated time price opportunity. I'll link the platform below for those who've not checked it out yet. Loading... **Kiyotaka.ai** — Trading charting platform yang cukup keren. Ini yang gue temukan:

### Fitur Utama:
- **Order flow visualization** — heatmap order book, CVD, delta
- **kScript** — scripting language khusus trader, bisa akses raw order-book arrays & multi-symbol data
- **Multi-exchange** — bisa gabungin data dari Binance, CME, dll dalam satu layar
- **Hubs** — shared workspace buat share strategy sesama trader
- **Timeframe Matrix** — lihat market di banyak timeframe sekaligus
- **Indikator:** Open Levels, Bid-Ask Depth Imbalance, Put-Call Ratio

### Verdict dari komunitas:
- Disebut "upgrading from tractor to Porsche" dari TradingLite
- Dipake Willy Woo, Skew Δ, CryptoCondom buat analysis BTC
- **Free & open-source tools**

Lo lagi pake ini buat trading crypto ya? Mau gue bantu sesuatu soal platform ini? 📊

Hmm, situs Kiyotaka timeout terus dari sini — kemungkinan karena:

1. **Heavy JS app** — charting platform butuh WebSocket/JS render, gak bisa di-scrape biasa
2. **Regional block** — bisa jadi akses dari server gue di-limit

### Yang bisa gue bilang:

Link `kiyotaka.ai/chart/kis5zUMp` itu **shared chart layout** dari Kiyotaka — kemungkinan berisi layout custom lo dengan pair/crypto tertentu + indikator-indikator yang lo pake (order flow, heatmap, dll).

**Gue gak bisa view chart interaktif** karena ini JavaScript-heavy app yang butuh browser real-time.

### Lo mau gue bantu apa dari situ?
- Mau bahas strategi trading tertentu?
- Mau gue bantu bikin kScript indicator?
- Mau bahas sesuatu soal order flow / analysis yang lo lihat di chart?

Kasih tau aja apa yang lo lihat di chart, gue bisa bantu analisis atau diskusi dari sana 📊
itu link workspcae

[SISTEM] 💡 SKILL LIBRARY — ada template yang relevan:

📋 pipeline-orchestrator: Pipeline Orchestrator: 1 tool call → multiple specialized agents jalan paralel → auto-compile via Reporter. Support: market_analysis, risk_analysis, research. Auto-fallback kalau agent error.
   Steps: 1. _dispatch_pipeline(args): agents[] + report_title + report_format. Validate types first (market_analysis/risk_analysis/research only, no nested spawn_agents), then count (2-6) → 2. Phase 1: ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=4) run all agents in parallel via DISPATCH[type](params) → 3. Phase 2: compile results with labels (Market Analysis: XAUUSD, Risk Assessment: EURUSD, etc) → 4. Phase 3: auto-call _dispatch_report(title, compiled_data, format). Fallback: return raw data if reporter fails

Oh oke, itu link **workspace Kiyotaka** lo. Tapi sayangnya gue gak bisa render/view chart interaktif dari sini karena:

- Kiyotaka fully JS-rendered app (React/Canvas)
- Butuh browser real-time + WebSocket connection
- Server scrape gue cuma bisa ambil raw HTML, gak bisa render chart

### Lo mau gue bantu apa dari workspace itu?

Kemungkinan yang bisa gue bantu:
1. **Diskusi strategi** — lo describe apa yang lo lihat di chart, gue bantu analisis
2. **Bikin/koreksi kScript** — kalau lo punya script indicator, gue bisa review/debug
3. **Build sesuatu** — kalau lo mau bikin bot/indicator baru berdasarkan data dari Kiyotaka
4. **Export data** — kalau lo bisa export data dari chart, gue bisa bantu olah

Mau yang mana? 📊
